accommodations.text: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: visual supports and models for new tasks

accommodations.text: Allow text-to-speech for grade-level reading passages.
Read test directions and math word problems aloud on request.
accommodations.source_quote: read test directions and math word problems aloud

accommodations.text: Do not grade spelling on first-draft written work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not grade spelling on first-draft written work

goals.text: Emma will request clarification when she misses information in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: request clarification when she misses information

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline

goals.text: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.
goals.baseline: Arrives with required materials in 3 of 10 class days.
goals.source_quote: arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days

goals.text: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Identifies the main idea with 40% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Grace will produce three organized sentences on a topic in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Produces one sentence on a topic in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: produce three organized sentences on a topic
